title: Kids Create Z-ANXXFEST Craft Kit, multicolor
features: Kids craft pack of 4 make your own festive figurines
In this pack you will receive: Plaster of Paris, 4 x coloured paints, 1 x paint brush and 4 x festive moulds
The figures you will receive are a Santa, Penguin, Elf and Gingerbread Man
Perfect for those rainy days and a great stocking filler
description: Make Your Own Christmas Figurines Festive Santa Elf Penguin Plaster Figures Kids Craft Kit
